Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Improved touch responsiveness and system configuration - moneyPlant done

- Optimized EMA smoothing (alpha 0.8) for snappier response
- Added instant EMA jump on rising edge to eliminate ramp-up delay
- Lowered JACK buffer sizes (128) for reduced audio latency
- Fixed USB audio card persistence (hw:3)
- Created wrapper scripts for easy Python and SuperCollider launch
- Added JACK cleanup on SuperCollider shutdown
- Configured persistent ALSA device mapping

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add stringsPlant instrument with chord building on touch11

- Implemented progressive chord building based on touch pressure
  - Root at 1.0 threshold
  - Third at 25.0 threshold (major third, 4 semitones)
  - Fifth at 50.0 threshold (perfect fifth, 7 semitones)
  - Octave at 75.0 threshold (12 semitones)
- All notes release together when hand lifts
- Fixed ''Group 1 not found'' error by adding s.initTree before warmer synth
- Fixed stuck note issue by freeing old synths and resetting flags in onFree
- Updated Python to poll touch11 (range 9-12)
- Using moneyPlant.wav temporarily (strings.aif has unsupported compression)

TODO: Fine-tune stringsPlant parameters (thresholds, amplitudes, envelopes)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add automatic sensor calibration on startup

- Implemented 3-second calibration routine at startup
- Finds minimum raw value for each sensor (idle/untouched state)
- Subtracts buffer of 3 to set RAW_MAX for each sensor
- Prints calibrated values before starting main loop
- Eliminates need for manual RAW_MAX array tuning

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
